bead.title: Stage 1.9: update concerns.md (partial edit)
bead.description: Update docs/helix/01-frame/concerns.md. Swap any React/Vite/Bun-as-React/TanStack/MiniSearch references in the Web UI subsection (near line 46) to SvelteKit/Bun/GraphQL/Houdini. IMPORTANT: Auth subsection (near line 98) stays UNCHANGED — existing localhost+tsnet model is preserved as-is. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #9.
bead.acceptance: (1) `grep -iE 'react|tanstack|minisearch' docs/helix/01-frame/concerns.md` returns ZERO matches. (2) `grep -n 'isTrusted\|localhost\|tsnet' docs/helix/01-frame/concerns.md` shows the auth subsection UNCHANGED from its pre-bead state.
